step.text: Workers comp process — Just Work Comp Law walks you through our Slip and fall at work workers comp process in Salt Lake City. Just Work Comp Law is a top-rated law firm in Utah specializing in workers' compensation cases. The firm serves clients across Utah, including Salt Lake City, Ogden, St. George, and Utah County, and also extends its services to Idaho.
